label: Dinner cocktail – classic formula
description: Standing cocktail dinner with hot and cold finger food, canapés, and chef-attended stations. Ideal for networking events and elegant evening receptions. Includes service staff.

label: Dinner cocktail – premium formula
description: Upscale standing cocktail dinner featuring premium canapés, seafood platters, carved meats, and sommelier-selected wines. Suitable for luxury galas and VIP receptions.

label: Seated dinner – 3 courses
description: Full plated seated dinner service with starter, main course, and dessert. Includes table service, sommelier assistance, and full tableware for indoor dining rooms or marquee tents.

label: Seated dinner – 5-course gastronomic
description: Gastronomic tasting menu with five plated courses, amuse-bouche, and paired wines. Chef-executed, ideal for award dinners, corporate galas, and prestige indoor events.

label: Buffet lunch
description: Self-service buffet lunch with hot and cold dishes, salads, and desserts. Flexible setup for corporate seminars, team events, and outdoor garden parties.

label: Prestige brunch
description: Elegant late-morning brunch with hot dishes, pastries, fresh juices, champagne, and live cooking station. Perfect for weekend celebrations and morning corporate events.

label: Food trucks (truck included)
description: Mobile food truck with chef team serving street food specialties on-site. Great for outdoor festivals, company picnics, and casual outdoor events. Truck operates rain or shine.

label: Welcome reception – 1h
description: One-hour standing welcome reception with drinks (juice, water, sparkling wine) and light canapés. Ideal aperitif before a seated dinner or conference opening.

label: Welcome reception – 2h
description: Two-hour welcome reception with flowing drinks, canapés, and mini bites. Suitable for event openings, networking cocktails, and pre-dinner receptions.

label: Full vegetarian menu
description: 100% vegetarian catering menu featuring plant-based starters, mains, and desserts. No meat or fish. Tailored for guests with dietary preferences or ethical requirements.

label: Full vegan menu
description: Fully vegan menu with no animal products: plant-based starters, mains, and desserts. Certified vegan ingredients. Suitable for health-conscious and ethically motivated guests.

label: Certified halal menu
description: Halal-certified full menu prepared according to Islamic dietary laws. Includes certified halal meats, starters, and desserts. Suitable for diverse international guest lists.

label: Certified kosher menu
description: Fully kosher-certified catering service supervised by a mashgiach. Separate meat and dairy options, certified ingredients. Required for Jewish community events and international galas.

label: Cheese & wine bar
description: Curated cheese board station with artisan cheeses, charcuterie, condiments, and paired wines or craft beers. Ideal as a reception extra or standalone networking station.

label: Sushi & tartare station
description: Live sushi and fish tartare chef station with fresh preparations per hour. Visual and gastronomic highlight for premium receptions, corporate events, and luxury weddings.

label: Candy bar & desserts
description: Sweet candy bar with macarons, éclairs, mini desserts, and seasonal sweets. Adds a festive sweet corner to events, ideal for weddings, birthdays, and children's parties.

label: Custom wedding/event cake
description: Custom-designed celebration cake crafted by a pastry chef for weddings, anniversaries, or corporate milestones. Available in multiple tiers with personalized decoration.

label: VIP meal box
description: Premium individually boxed meal for VIP guests, artists, or staff. Contains a main course, dessert, snack, and beverage. Ideal for backstage catering and green room hospitality.

label: Cocktail bar animation
description: Professional mixologist performing cocktail-making shows and serving custom cocktails per hour. Entertaining and interactive bar service for receptions, parties, and galas.

label: Continental breakfast service
description: Morning breakfast service with pastries, bread, butter, jam, yogurt, fruit, juices, coffee, and tea. Suitable for early-morning seminars, hotel room service, or team kick-off meetings.

label: Indoor sound system <300 pax
description: Complete indoor PA sound system for up to 300 guests: speakers, amplifiers, mixer, and cabling. Suitable for conferences, corporate dinners, and indoor concerts in halls or ballrooms.

label: Indoor sound system 300–1000 pax
description: Professional line-array indoor sound system for 300 to 1000 guests. Covers large ballrooms, exhibition halls, and conventions with even audio distribution and subwoofers.

label: Indoor sound system >1000 pax
description: Large-format indoor line-array PA system for events exceeding 1000 guests. Designed for arena-style events, large concerts, and major corporate conventions indoors.

label: Outdoor sound system – medium
description: Weatherproof outdoor PA sound system for medium outdoor events (500–2000 pax). Includes ground-stacked line arrays, subwoofers, and stage monitoring. Rain-resistant equipment.

label: Outdoor sound system – large stage
description: Festival-grade outdoor sound system for large stages and open-air concerts. Flying line-array clusters, extensive subwoofer arrays, and full front-of-house mixing position.

label: Indoor LED screen – 6x3m
description: High-resolution indoor LED video wall 6x3 meters for conferences, concerts, and presentations. Fine pixel pitch for close viewing. Includes controller, rigging, and technician.

label: Outdoor LED screen – 9x5m
description: Large outdoor LED screen 9x5 meters, weatherproof, high brightness for daylight viewing. Ideal for outdoor concerts, sports events, and open-air ceremonies. Rain-resistant.

label: HD projector + screen
description: High-definition projector with 120-inch projection screen for conferences, training sessions, and indoor presentations. Simple setup with HDMI/wireless connectivity.

label: 4K projector + video mapping
description: Ultra-high-definition 4K projector with video mapping software for immersive indoor projections on architecture, stages, or custom surfaces. Creative visual storytelling for galas.

label: Simultaneous interpretation system (4 languages)
description: Wireless simultaneous interpretation system for 4 language channels with interpreter booths, delegate receivers, and headsets. Essential for international conferences and summits.

label: Wireless microphones (set of 4)
description: Set of 4 professional wireless handheld and lapel microphones. Suitable for speeches, panel discussions, conferences, and live events. Includes receiver and charging dock.

label: Lectern
description: Professional podium lectern for speakers at conferences, award ceremonies, and corporate events. Includes gooseneck microphone, reading light, and logo panel option.

label: HD audio-video recording
description: Full HD multi-camera audio and video recording of the event. Includes post-production edit for highlights. Ideal for conferences, concerts, and corporate events archiving.

label: Live streaming
description: Professional live streaming service to broadcast events online via YouTube, Teams, or custom CDN. Includes encoder, bandwidth, camera operator, and graphics overlay.

label: Sound/lighting technician
description: Experienced AV technician managing sound and lighting systems on-site throughout the event. Ensures quality, handles technical issues, and supports performers and speakers.

label: Indoor stage lighting
description: Complete indoor stage lighting rig with front wash, back lighting, and key lights for performers and speakers. Ideal for gala dinners, award ceremonies, and indoor concerts.

label: Outdoor architectural lighting
description: Outdoor uplighting and architectural illumination of facades, trees, and grounds. Creates dramatic visual ambiance for evening outdoor events, garden parties, and open-air ceremonies.

label: Facade video mapping
description: Immersive video projection mapped onto building facades or large outdoor surfaces. Custom animated content for gala openings, product launches, and spectacular evening shows.

label: LED string light decoration
description: Warm-white LED festoon string lights for decorative canopy or pergola illumination. Creates cosy atmosphere for outdoor terraces, garden weddings, and evening receptions.

label: Colour wash spotlights (set of 8)
description: Set of 8 RGB LED colour wash spotlights for accent lighting, stage colour, and event branding. Controllable via DMX for dynamic colour changes during indoor or outdoor events.

label: Moving head lights (set of 4)
description: Set of 4 professional moving head beam and wash lights. Creates dynamic, programmable light shows for concerts, nightclub-style parties, galas, and entertainment events.

label: Laser show
description: Multi-colour laser light show with programmed sequences and live operator. Spectacular visual effect for concerts, new year events, product launches, and premium evening events.

label: DMX lighting controller
description: Professional DMX 512 lighting controller console for managing all stage and decorative lights. Required for programming and live control of moving heads, washes, and LED fixtures.

label: Pagoda tent 5x5m
description: Small outdoor pagoda tent 5x5 meters providing weather protection and shade. Suitable for market stalls, outdoor bars, small garden parties, and reception entry points. Waterproof canopy.

label: Semi-closed tent 10x20m
description: Medium-size semi-enclosed outdoor tent 10x20 meters with optional side walls and flooring. Weather-protected space for outdoor dining, product exhibitions, and garden events.

label: Stretch clear-span tent 20x40m
description: Large clear-span tent 20x40 meters with no internal poles, fully weatherproof walls and roof. Suitable for outdoor weddings, conferences, and gala dinners requiring enclosed outdoor space.

label: Prestige marquee 30x50m
description: Premium prestige marquee 30x50 meters with interior lining, chandeliers, wooden flooring, and climate control. Transforms any outdoor site into an elegant, weather-protected event venue.

label: Stage/podium 6x4m
description: Modular outdoor or indoor stage platform 6x4 meters with guardrails and steps. Suitable for presentations, award ceremonies, small concerts, and speaking events.

label: Stage/podium 12x8m
description: Large performance stage 12x8 meters with heavy-duty structure, guardrails, and access stairs. Designed for concerts, large ceremonies, and festival main stages.

label: Modular raised platform
description: Adjustable height modular raised platform per square meter for VIP areas, podiums, or dance floors. Configurable for indoor halls and outdoor settings.

label: Dance floor
description: Portable dance floor panels per square meter, available in black, white, or parquet finish. Suitable for indoor and outdoor events. Protective covering for ground and grass.

label: Crowd control barriers
description: Metal crowd control barriers per linear meter for queue management, perimeter security, and stage front protection at outdoor concerts and public events.

label: Stage fencing
description: Heavy-duty stage fencing per meter to secure stage perimeter and backstage areas at concerts and outdoor festivals. Prevents unauthorized access and improves crowd flow.

label: Waterproof flooring (per m²)
description: Heavy-duty waterproof interlocking floor panels per square meter. Protects guests from wet muddy ground during rain at outdoor events, festivals, and garden parties. Rain-proof surface.

label: Round tables 180cm (10 pax)
description: Round banquet table 180cm diameter seating 10 guests. Standard for seated dinners, galas, weddings, and indoor receptions. Includes setup and positioning.

label: Gold Chiavari chairs
description: Elegant gold Chiavari banquet chairs for upscale events, weddings, galas, and award dinners. Classic Italian design with cushion seat. Suitable for indoor seated events.

label: White Napoleon chairs
description: White Napoleon ghost-style chairs for modern event aesthetics. Lightweight, stackable, and suitable for both indoor and outdoor ceremonies and receptions.

label: Lounge furniture set
description: Designer lounge seating set including sofa, armchairs, and coffee table. Creates relaxed VIP lounge areas at galas, festivals, corporate events, and wedding receptions.

label: High bar tables (standing)
description: Tall standing bar-height tables for cocktail receptions, networking events, and outdoor standing parties. Available with linen covers in black or white.

label: Floral centrepiece decoration
description: Fresh flower table centrepiece arrangement for banquet and dining tables. Custom seasonal flowers. Elevates the visual decor of galas, weddings, and corporate dinners.

label: Floral entrance arch
description: Large floral arch at event entrance, made with fresh flowers and greenery. Creates a stunning visual feature for weddings, brand events, and VIP photo opportunities.

label: Printed photo backdrop 3x2m
description: Custom printed fabric or vinyl photo backdrop 3x2 meters with branded or decorative motif. Used for photo stations, media walls, and brand visibility at corporate events.

label: Interactive photo booth
description: Digital interactive photo booth with props, instant printing, and social media sharing. Entertaining guest activity for indoor parties, weddings, galas, and brand events.

label: Room draping & fabric decor
description: Full ceiling and wall draping with chiffon or organza fabric to transform indoor event venues. Creates an elegant, intimate atmosphere for galas, weddings, and themed events.

label: Directional signage
description: Complete event directional signage package including arrows, room signs, and information boards. Essential for multi-zone venues, conferences, and outdoor festival sites.

label: White table linen
description: Crisp white tablecloth covering per table for banquets, dinners, and receptions. Available in standard and round table sizes. Pressed and stain-treated.

label: Porcelain tableware (full set)
description: Complete porcelain tableware set per guest: dinner plate, side plate, soup bowl, and cutlery. Required for seated dinners, galas, and catering at indoor venues.

label: Crystal glassware
description: Crystal glassware set per guest including water glass, red wine, white wine, and champagne flute. Elevates table presentation at premium indoor galas and corporate dinners.

label: Custom branded umbrella
description: Large printed branded umbrella for outdoor event guests. Provides rain protection and acts as a branded keepsake. Ideal for outdoor events when rain is forecast. Weatherproof.

label: Disposable rain poncho (pack of 50)
description: Pack of 50 disposable waterproof rain ponchos for outdoor guests during wet weather. Lightweight, one-size-fits-all, available in branded or generic colors. Essential rainy day outdoor protection.

label: Outdoor patio heater
description: Free-standing outdoor infrared or gas patio heater for outdoor terraces and garden events in cold weather. Provides warmth for guests at outdoor standing receptions and evening events.

label: Security guard
description: Professional uniformed security guard per post per night. Access control, patrol, and perimeter monitoring. Required for large events, concerts, and VIP gatherings.

label: Dog handler
description: Security dog handler team per post per night for enhanced perimeter security, explosive or narcotics detection. Used at high-security corporate events and VIP venues.

label: Security gate/arch
description: Walk-through metal detection security arch for guest screening at event entrances. Required at concerts, public events, and high-security corporate gatherings.

label: Security coordinator
description: Senior security coordinator managing all safety and security operations for the event. Coordinates security personnel, liaises with police, and implements emergency procedures.

label: RFID badge system
description: Full RFID access control badge system for events with restricted zones. Includes badge printers, readers at entry points, and real-time attendance tracking software.

label: Professional DJ
description: Professional DJ with full sound equipment for evening events, parties, galas, and clubs. Sets curated to event style: lounge, dance, corporate, or wedding. Includes setup and teardown.

label: Jazz orchestra – 5 musicians
description: Live jazz ensemble of 5 musicians (piano, bass, drums, trumpet, saxophone) for elegant evening receptions, galas, and outdoor summer events. Performs jazz standards and bossa nova.

label: Chamber orchestra – 12 musicians
description: Classical chamber orchestra of 12 musicians for prestigious indoor concerts, award galas, and cultural events. Performs classical repertoire and contemporary arrangements.

label: Live music band
description: Professional live music band for corporate events, weddings, and outdoor festivals. Covers pop, rock, soul, or variety setlist. Includes PA system and stage monitoring.

label: Circus artist
description: Circus and variety performance artist for event entertainment. Includes acrobats, jugglers, stilt walkers, or fire performers. Suitable for outdoor festivals and indoor galas.

label: Close-up magician
description: Close-up table magician performing interactive card tricks, mind reading, and sleight of hand per hour. Ideal for cocktail receptions, corporate dinners, and wedding parties.

label: Event host/MC
description: Professional event host and master of ceremonies for conferences, galas, award shows, and corporate events. Bilingual options available. Keeps program on schedule and energizes audience.

label: Fireworks show
description: Professional outdoor fireworks display show with licensed pyrotechnician. Synchronized to music for new year events, outdoor celebrations, wedding finales, and grand openings.

label: Dance performance
description: Professional dance troupe performance including ballet, contemporary, flamenco, or street dance. Live performance for galas, cultural events, opening ceremonies, and award shows.

label: Corporate escape game
description: Mobile corporate escape room experience delivered on-site. Team-building activity using puzzles, riddles, and challenges. Suitable for indoor and outdoor corporate events.

label: Cooking competition (MasterChef style)
description: Facilitated MasterChef-style cooking competition team-building event with ingredients, chef coaches, and judging. High engagement activity for indoor corporate events and team retreats.

label: Hosted wine tasting
description: Expert-led wine tasting session per hour with sommelier, tasting notes, and curated wine selection. Educational and entertaining experience for corporate receptions and gala dinners.

label: Event photographer
description: Professional event photographer capturing the full day's highlights, portraits, and candid moments. Full-day coverage with post-production editing and digital gallery delivery.

label: Photographer + videographer
description: Combined full-day photography and videography team. Provides both high-resolution photo gallery and highlight video. Ideal for weddings, galas, and corporate events.

label: 3-minute after-movie
description: Professionally edited 3-minute event after-movie with cinematic footage, music, color grading, and motion graphics. Perfect for sharing on social media and internal communication.

label: Cinematic drone
description: Licensed drone operator capturing aerial cinematography per half-day. Stunning overhead views of outdoor venues, festivals, and estate events. Subject to airspace regulations.

label: Photographer with same-day editing
description: Event photographer delivering edited photos the same day during the event, ideal for slideshows at galas and award ceremonies. Fast turnaround with on-site editing workstation.

label: Minibus shuttle 16 seats
description: Minibus shuttle service with driver, 16-seat capacity, for guest transportation between venue and hotels or stations. Ideal for corporate events, weddings, and conference shuttles.

label: Coach bus 50 seats
description: Full-size 50-seat coach bus with driver for group transfers and transport for large corporate events, conferences, and wedding guest shuttles.

label: VIP limousine (up to 4 pax)
description: Luxury limousine or executive sedan for VIP guest transportation. Full-day availability for up to 4 passengers. Ideal for VIP arrivals, speakers, and keynote guests.

label: VIP airport transfer (sedan)
description: Single VIP airport transfer per journey in luxury executive sedan with professional driver. Meet-and-greet service at arrivals. For individual VIP guests or speakers.

label: Valet parking
description: Professional valet parking service for event guests. Valets manage car flow, parking, and retrieval. Reduces congestion at venue entry and provides luxury guest experience.

label: Secured parking
description: Dedicated secured and guarded parking area for event guests and staff vehicles. Includes security supervision and access control. Suitable for large outdoor events.

label: Standard room – group rate
description: Standard hotel room at negotiated group rate per night per room. Booked for guests and speakers staying overnight at multi-day conferences, weddings, and corporate retreats.

label: Superior room – group rate
description: Superior hotel room at group rate per night. Larger room with enhanced amenities for senior guests, VIP participants, and speakers at multi-day events and conventions.

label: Junior suite (1 night)
description: Junior hotel suite for one night for VIP guests, keynote speakers, or wedding couples. Includes lounge area, premium amenities, and priority service.

label: Custom printed invitations (100 copies)
description: Set of 100 custom-designed and professionally printed event invitations with envelopes. Includes graphic design, proofing, and premium paper stock for corporate and private events.

label: Event mobile app
description: Custom event mobile app for guests: program, agenda, maps, networking, and push notifications. Available for iOS and Android. Enhances attendee experience at conferences and multi-day events.

label: Event website
description: Custom event landing page or microsite with registration, agenda, speakers, venue info, and countdown. Includes hosting and technical support during the event.

label: Live social media wall
description: Real-time social media aggregation wall displayed on screens, showing guest posts and hashtag feeds from Instagram, X, and LinkedIn. Boosts social engagement at corporate events.

label: Translation & interpreting
description: Professional translator and interpreter for written and spoken communication at international events, conferences, and negotiations. Available in major European and Asian languages.

label: Generator 100 kVA
description: 100 kVA diesel generator for outdoor power supply at events without mains electricity. Powers sound, lighting, catering equipment, and temporary structures. Essential for outdoor events.

label: Generator 250 kVA
description: 250 kVA heavy-duty diesel generator providing high-power supply for large outdoor events. Supports full concert production, large tents with climate control, and multi-zone outdoor festivals.

label: Mobile air conditioning unit
description: Portable mobile air conditioning unit for cooling tents, marquees, and indoor spaces during hot weather events. Reduces heat discomfort for guests in enclosed event spaces.

label: Mobile hot air heater
description: Large-capacity mobile hot air blower heater for heating marquees, tents, and outdoor structures in cold or rainy weather. Keeps guests comfortable at cold outdoor events.

label: High-density Wi-Fi (dedicated network)
description: Dedicated high-density Wi-Fi network for events with many simultaneous users. Includes access points, network management, and a private SSID for guest connectivity.

label: Mobile charging stations
description: Mobile device charging station per unit per day with multiple USB and fast-charge ports. Keeps attendees connected at conferences, outdoor festivals, and multi-day events.

label: Electric space heater (indoor)
description: Electric infrared or convection space heater per unit per day for indoor spaces. Provides supplemental warmth in halls, marquees, and indoor venues during cold weather events.

label: Mobile gas heater
description: Portable propane or natural gas heater per unit per day for outdoor terraces, tented spaces, and semi-open areas. Fast heating for cold or rainy outdoor event conditions.

label: First-aider/paramedic
description: Qualified first-aider or paramedic on standby throughout the event. Handles medical emergencies, minor injuries, and health incidents. Required for events above 300 guests.

label: Standby ambulance
description: Standby ambulance with EMT crew available on-site for immediate medical response. Required for large outdoor events, concerts, and sports gatherings. Ensures rapid emergency intervention.

label: Emergency safety plan & coordination
description: Comprehensive event safety plan including risk assessment, emergency procedures, evacuation map, and on-site safety coordinator. Required for public events and large venue bookings.

label: Event project manager
description: Experienced event project manager overseeing all logistics, supplier coordination, and on-site operations. Ensures smooth execution of the full event program from setup to teardown.

label: Logistics assistant
description: On-site logistics assistant supporting setup, supplier reception, material handling, and general operational tasks throughout the event day. Works under the event project manager.

label: Reception host
description: Professional reception and welcome host greeting guests at the event entrance, managing registration, distributing badges, and directing attendees to their areas.

label: General stage manager
description: Stage manager coordinating all on-stage activity: cues, speaker order, technical transitions, and performer logistics. Ensures smooth show flow at concerts, award shows, and galas.

label: Outdoor venue rental
description: Rental of the outdoor event space for the full event day. Price set per venue. Includes access to grounds, outdoor facilities, and site infrastructure. Subject to weather conditions.

label: Indoor venue rental
description: Rental of the indoor event hall or room for the full event day. Price set per venue. Provides weather-protected enclosed space with heating, air conditioning, and indoor facilities.
